productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Boys White Pack of 3 Casual Socks
description: Pack of three pairs of white socks It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into any one of these pair of socks from adidas. Made for today's active kids, these socks are perfect for Sports and casual outing Made of 69% cotton, 29% nylon and 2% elastane Small rib at opening to grip below ankle with narrow stripe Three dimensional shaped heel and toe for best Fit Sock care Machine wash in warm water below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
